title: Syrian-Style Shrimp Dumplings with Gooey Sauce
description: A fusion of flavors, this recipe combines the savory taste of Syrian spices with the sweetness of gooey sauce and the freshness of shrimp, all wrapped in a delicious dumpling.

ingredients.name: Syrian spices
ingredients.notes: A mix of paprika, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the Syrian spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the dumpling wrappers by following the package instructions.
Place a dumpling wrapper in the pan and add a few pieces of cooked shrimp on one half of the wrapper.
Add a spoonful of gooey sauce on top of the shrimp and fold the wrapper in half to form a half-moon shape.
Seal the edges by pressing them together and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the dumpling is golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Serve the Syrian-Style Shrimp Dumplings with additional gooey sauce on top.
